page_metadata.biotools__summary:
QSAR-derived Affinity Fingerprints (part 2): modeling performance for cytotoxicity prediction.

To generate the results in our paper run run_QAFFP.py as indicated in the file launch_all.sh. All the data sets used in the publications are in the folder: sdf_files.
